homepage.title: QuaternAR – QuaternAR
homepage.text_excerpt:
QuaternAR – QuaternAR
Don’t Rewrite.
Extend.
QAROS connects your existing software directly to AR and VR.
No engine migration. No reimplementation.
Your rendering pipeline stays yours. We handle the rest.
Let’s make XR practical.
Most XR tools were designed for demos and prototypes.
QAROS brings immersive capability to the software people already use.
No rebuilds and no new engines. Your existing workflow simply extends into AR and VR.
Teams work faster, review designs together, and see complex data in context.
It turns XR from a showcase into a productivity tool.
Built for real software.
QAROS works directly with DirectX, Vulkan, OpenGL, or even CPU‑based renderers. It streams pixel data instead of geometry, so your shaders, lighting, and visuals stay exactly as you designed them.
Rendering happens on full desktop or server hardware, not a portable headset, which means higher resolution, more detail, and full fidelity.
Your engine remains yours. QAROS connects it to immersive space.
Secure. Scalable. Ready.
QAROS runs on any standard PC and can be fully self-hosted for complete control.
All streams are encrypted and no data is stored on end devices.
It scales from a single workstation to an entire site, connecting multiple users and environments securely.
We keep QAROS updated to support the latest XR devices so your application keeps working without changes.
One system. Real-time collaboration.
Multiple applications from different vendors can run together in the same shared 3D environment.
Users can view, interact, and work across them at the same time in a single shared virtual environment.
You can mix devices in a single session: AR and VR headsets, 3D displays, desktops, and tablets, all synchronized through the QAROS runtime.
You choose the right tool for the job and QAROS makes them all work together.
